items.name: llm-wiki-agent
items.description: A personal knowledge base that builds and maintains itself. Drop in sources — Claude (or Codex/Gemini) reads them, extracts knowledge, and maintains a persistent interlinked wiki. Works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI. No API key needed.

items.name: claude-obsidian
items.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent, compounding wiki vault based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. /wiki /save /autoresearch

items.name: llm-wiki-compiler
items.description: The knowledge compiler. Raw sources in, interlinked wiki out. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

items.name: obsidian-wiki
items.description: Framework for AI agents to build and maintain an Obsidian wiki using Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern

items.name: swarmvault
items.description: Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki. Local-first RAG knowledge base compiler with MCP server (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw). Turn raw research into a persistent markdown wiki, knowledge graph, and hybrid search that compound over time.

items.name: llm-wiki
items.description: Hệ thống knowledge base cá nhân hoàn toàn tự động, vận hành bởi LLM. Dựa trên pattern LLM Wiki của Andrej Karpathy.

items.name: second-brain
items.description: LLM-maintained personal knowledge base for Obsidian. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

items.name: obsidian-llm-wiki-local
items.description: Karpathy’s LLM Wiki, 100% local with Ollama. Drop Markdown notes → AI extracts concepts → your Obsidian wiki auto-links and grows. Zero sharing. Your notes stay yours.

items.name: obsidian-NotEMD
items.description: A Easy way to create your own Knowledge-base! Notemd enhances your Obsidian workflow by integrating with various Large Language Models (LLMs) to process your notes, automatically generate wiki-links for key concepts, create corresponding concept notes, perform web research, and more.

items.name: Index.skill
items.description: 基于Claude与Obsidian/WebUI的个人知识管理、更新、交互系统“茵蒂克丝.skill”（LLM Wiki）。同济大学工程智能研究院出品~

items.name: llm-wiki
items.description: LLM-powered knowledge base from your Claude Code, Codex CLI, Copilot, Cursor & Gemini sessions. Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern — implemented and shipped.

items.name: llm-wikid
items.description: Karpathy-style LLM knowledge base for Obsidian. Clone, run Claude Code, start building your second brain.

items.name: memoriki
items.description: Memoriki - LLM Wiki + MemPalace. Personal knowledge base with real memory.

items.name: til
items.description: Personal knowledge base following Zettelkasten + LLM Wiki pattern. Obsidian-compatible.

items.name: llm-context-base
items.description: A git template for building your own LLM-powered personal wiki. Training period, metadata standard, lint system included. Clone and go.

items.name: llm-wiki
items.description: Build Karpathy's LLM Wiki with Claude Code. L1/L2 cache architecture. Logseq + Obsidian support.

items.name: llm-wiki
items.description: LLM Wiki — Claude Code plugin for persistent, compounding knowledge bases in Obsidian

items.name: llm-wiki-template
items.description: A reusable template for building personal LLM-maintained knowledge bases. Implements Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

items.name: llm-wiki-compiler
items.description: Compile documents into a living Obsidian wiki. Any AI agent. Based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

items.name: Karpathy-LLM-Wiki-Stack
items.description: A comprehensive, build-ready reference for constructing a high-performance personal knowledge system using Obsidian and Claude Code, grounded in Andrej Karpathy's "LLM Wiki" pattern.

items.name: llm-knowledge-bases
items.description: Claude Code plugin for building LLM-maintained Obsidian wikis from raw research — compile, query, lint, and evolve your personal knowledge base. Inspired by Karpathy's knowledge base workflow.

items.name: ctx
items.description: Real-time skill and agent recommendation engine for Claude Code - watches what you develop, walks a knowledge graph of 1,725 skills and 443 agents, and suggests the right ones on the fly. Powered by a Karpathy LLM wiki with persistent memory.

items.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
items.description: Turn your LLM into a wiki maintainer. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki. Built for Obsidian, Claude Code & Codex. | 让   LLM 成为你的 wiki 维护者。受 Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 启发。面向 Obsidian、Claude Code 和 Codex 构建。

items.name: para-knowledge-base
items.description: LLM Knowledge Base for PARA-structured Obsidian vaults — Karpathy's llm-wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin

items.name: obsidian-ai-second-brain
items.description: Obsidian + Claude AI 个人知识库完整搭建指南 | 基于 Karpathy LLM Wiki 方法论 | 4 阶段 12 步 | 不用写代码

items.name: llm_wiki_agent
items.description: MCP server that turns raw sources into an interlinked Obsidian wiki with Claude Code.

items.name: LoreNote
items.description: A modern, open-source alternative to Obsidian. Local-first, lightning fast, and fully extensible. Your data, your control.

items.name: llm-obsidian-wiki
items.description: Claude Code plugin for building persistent, compounding knowledge bases in Obsidian. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

items.name: llm-wiki-claude-skills
items.description: Turn your markdown vault into a compounding knowledge wiki (Karpathy inspired). Five Claude agent skills - knowledge grows with every conversation. Works with Obsidian, Logseq, etc. or just folders on your local drive. GUI install, no terminal, no code.
